# Introduction to Graph Theory

<!-- say: Welcome to this lecture on graph theory. Today we'll cover the basics. -->

---

# What is a Graph?

- A set of vertices
- Connected by edges

<!-- say(voice=alice, pace=slow): A graph is a mathematical structure consisting of vertices connected by edges. Think of it like a social network. -->

---

# Euler's Theorem

$$\sum_{v \in V} \deg(v) = 2|E|$$

<!-- say: Euler's handshaking theorem tells us that the sum of all vertex degrees equals twice the number of edges. -->
